action.description:
Introduced by Senators Hesselbein, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Ratcliff, Roys, L. Johnson, Dassler-Alfheim, Smith, Carpenter, Larson and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Johnson, Sinicki, Rivera-Wagner, Tenorio, Miresse, Joers, Subeck, Stubbs, Kaufert, Udell, Sheehan, Roe, McCarville, Hong, Bare, Arney, Neubauer and Stroud
